varlistentry.term: Member mata::nfa::determinize (const Nfa &aut, std::unordered_map< StateSet, State > *subset_map=nullptr, std::optional< std::function< bool(const Nfa &, const State, const StateSet &)> > macrostate_discover=std::nullopt)

listitem.para: : TODO: Add support for specifying first epsilon symbol and compute epsilon closure during determinization.

varlistentry.term: Member mata::nfa::lang_difference (const Nfa &nfa_included, const Nfa &nfa_excluded, std::optional< std::function< bool(const Nfa &, const Nfa &, const StateSet &, const StateSet &, const State, const Nfa &)> > macrostate_discover=std::nullopt)

listitem.para: : TODO: Add support for specifying first epsilon symbol and compute epsilon closure during determinization.
